subcodes.first_line: In most of the Tablets hath the mention of the raven's croaking flowed from the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در اکثری از الواح ذکر نعیق ناعق از قلم اعلی جاری
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital
